summary: Frontend-only tests for self-serve PayPal sponsor subscription. Dialog opens from footer, shows $29/mo + first month FREE, validates required fields (name/cuisine/email), gracefully handles expected backend 503 with toast 'Online sponsorship isn't available yet — please email us.' and re-enables Subscribe button. /sponsor/cancelled renders 'Checkout cancelled' card; /sponsor/success (no params) renders 'Almost there' pending card. Both status pages have working /home link. Admin regression: login with GrimReaper!2026 works, 'Add a sponsor' form and 'Current sponsors' list both load.
critical_code_review_comments: BecomeSponsorDialog: form is not reset after successful navigation or on dialog close — minor UX issue since page navigates away on success anyway.
SponsorStatus.jsx: polling uses fixed 6 tries * 2.5s (~15s) then falls back to 'pending' — acceptable but could surface a manual retry.
No client-side email format validation before POST (relies on browser type=email + backend); acceptable given backend validates.
test_credentials: Admin password: GrimReaper!2026 (from request; /app/memory/test_credentials.md not consulted as auth is admin-only single password).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal SECRET intentionally blank -> POST /api/sponsors/subscribe returns 503; UI handles gracefully. When PayPal sandbox secret is added, re-test full E2E: subscribe should redirect to approval_url, then /sponsor/success?subscription_id=... should poll /api/sponsors/subscription-status and flip to 'You're live!' once webhook fires.
